destinations.title: Maui Cove

destinations.title: Northern Lights Lodge
destinations.description: Experience the magical aurora borealis from a cozy lodge in the heart of Iceland.

destinations.title: Metro Bloom Hotel
destinations.best_time_to_visit: March to May, October to November
destinations.description: Immerse yourself in Tokyo's vibrant culture, world-class cuisine, and neon-lit streets.

destinations.title: Golden Bay Escape
destinations.description: Relax on golden beaches, explore rice terraces, and enjoy Balinese spa treatments.

destinations.title: Alpine Retreat

destinations.title: Coral Reef Resort
destinations.description: Luxurious overwater bungalows with direct access to vibrant coral reefs.

destinations.title: Sage Canyon Lodge
destinations.best_time_to_visit: March to May, September to November
destinations.description: Red rock canyon views, spiritual retreats, and adventure hiking in Sedona.

faq.question: How do I book a trip?
faq.answer: You can book directly through our website by selecting a destination and clicking the Book Now button.

faq.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: Free cancellation up to 14 days before departure. After that, a 50% fee applies.

faq.question: Are flights included in the price?
faq.answer: No, prices shown are for accommodation and the listed inclusions only. Flights are not included.

faq.question: Do you offer group discounts?
faq.answer: Yes! Groups of 5 or more receive a 10% discount. Contact our support team for details.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and bank transfers.
